proposed: every hour from 9 a.m. until 6 p.m.
every hour from 1 a.m. until midnight
every minute from 9 a.m. until 11 a.m.
every five minutes from 9 a.m. until 6 p.m.
every minute from 0 through 30 past the hour, from 9 a.m. until 6 p.m.
every hour from 10 p.m. until midnight
every second of every other hour
every second of the midnight hour
every second during the 9 a.m., 11 a.m., 1 p.m., 3 p.m., and 5 p.m. hours
every second of minute :00 of every hour
every second of minutes :00 through :30 of every hour
every two minutes from midnight until 1 a.m.
every minute of every other hour
every five hours from midnight through 8 p.m.  [CONTRAST: hour STEP keeps 'through' — should NOT become 'until']
every day at 9 a.m.  [CONTRAST: single hour, no window]
